summary: Frontend testing of 3 new features: (1) Enquiry product required validation, (2) Tax Settings province/state dropdown, (3) Auth & Pages section with 4 subtabs. ALL TESTS PASSED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified working: (1) Create Enquiry dialog shows 'Product is required' toast when submitting without product, (2) Tax Settings shows province/state as a combobox dropdown (not text input) with 13 CA provinces or 51 US states depending on country, hides for non-CA/US countries, (3) Auth & Pages section has 4 subtabs (Authentication, App Pages, Checkout Flow, Footer) with correct tile organization.

features_tested.details: Submitting Create Enquiry dialog without selecting a product shows toast 'Product is required'. Product field labeled with RequiredLabel asterisk. Dialog has correct data-testid attributes.

features_tested.feature: Tax Settings - Province/State dropdown for CA
features_tested.details: When Canada (CA) selected, 'Your Province' field shows as a combobox/Select dropdown (not text input). Populated with Canadian provinces from /utils/provinces?country_code=CA API.

features_tested.feature: Tax Settings - State dropdown for US
features_tested.details: When United States (US) selected, 'Your State' field shows as a combobox/Select dropdown with 51 US states from /utils/provinces?country_code=US API.

features_tested.feature: Tax Settings - No state field for non-CA/US countries
features_tested.details: When UK selected, no Province/State field is shown at all.
All 4 subtabs present: Authentication, App Pages, Checkout Flow, Footer.
Login Page, Sign Up Page, Verify Email, Partner Sign-Up Page, 404 Not Found all present.
Navigation is FIRST, then Customer Portal, Services Page (not 'Store Hero Banner'), Resources Page (not 'Articles Hero Banner'), Documents Page, Profile Page, Admin Panel. Old names absent.
Checkout Page Builder, Checkout Success, GoCardless Callback, Checkout Messages all present.
Footer Text, About Us, Contact Info, Social Media present. Navigation NOT in Footer tab.
